query:
-- 检查用户管理中的老师账号角色
SELECT id, name, phone, roles FROM users WHERE roles LIKE '%老师%' ORDER BY id LIMIT 10;

-- 统计老师角色用户总数
SELECT COUNT(*) as total FROM users WHERE roles LIKE '%老师%';

-- 检查角色分配是否正确(应该包含"普通用户+老师+对应城市")
SELECT 
  name, 
  roles,
  CASE 
    WHEN roles LIKE '%普通用户%' AND roles LIKE '%老师%' THEN '正确'
    ELSE '缺少角色'
  END as role_check
FROM users 
WHERE roles LIKE '%老师%'
LIMIT 10;

    ELSE '缺少角色'
  END as role_check
FROM users 
WHERE roles LIKE '%老师%'
LIMIT 10;
